Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Fixed AutoTidy retrieval confirmation so a temporary unreadable retainer listing state is not treated as a completed retrieval.
Updated docs and tester guidance to consistently describe AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy.
Corrected public custom repo documentation to reference icon.jpg.
